# SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting.system

**Case**

Displays an alert when using Presenter Overlay based on the System Settings.

## Declaration

```swift
case system
```

## Alerting Presenters

- **SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting.always**: Always display an alert when using Presenter Overlay.
- **SCPresenterOverlayAlertSetting.never**: Never display an alert when using Presenter Overlay.
